## data-structures package

Useful data structures such as LRU-Cache, set-multi-map, Signal, EventEmitter, Disposable, Debouncer

## Classes

|  Class | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  [Debouncer](https://wixplosives.github.io/core3-utils (push)/data-structures.debouncer.md) | Cancelable debouncing of calls to trigger |
|  [EventEmitter](https://wixplosives.github.io/core3-utils (push)/data-structures.eventemitter.md) | A simple event emitter |
|  [LRUCache](https://wixplosives.github.io/core3-utils (push)/data-structures.lrucache.md) | BASIC (not optimal) implementation of the LRU cache |
|  [SetMultiMap](https://wixplosives.github.io/core3-utils (push)/data-structures.setmultimap.md) | Maps keys to a set of values |
|  [Signal](https://wixplosives.github.io/core3-utils (push)/data-structures.signal.md) | Signal is a simple event emitter for one type of event. |
